report_name: Teenage Hackers Convicted for Cyber-Attack on Transport for London, Highlighting Persistent Threats to Critical Infrastructure

identities.name: Transport for London
identities.description: The governing body for the transport system in Greater London, which was the victim of a cyber-attack carried out by a group of teenagers.

indicators.name: High Volume of Failed Logon Attempts
indicators.pattern:
title: High Volume of Failed Logon Attempts
id: 9c5b1f3a-8d7e-4b9f-8c2a-1b4d9e0f3c2a
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects failed logon attempts (Windows Event ID 4625). A high volume of these events from a single source may indicate a brute-force or password spraying attack, as suggested in the report's hunting hints. This rule only detects a single event and requires correlation in a SIEM to be effective.
references:
  - https://www.devexpress.com/Support/Demos/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-27
tags:
  - attack.t1110
level: low
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: security
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 4625
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects failed logon attempts (Windows Event ID 4625). A high volume of these events from a single source may indicate a brute-force or password spraying attack, as suggested in the report's hunting hints.

indicators.name: Execution of Common Reconnaissance Commands
indicators.pattern:
title: Execution of Common Reconnaissance Commands
id: f8e7d6c5-b4a3-4987-6543-2109fedcba98
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects the execution of basic reconnaissance commands (whoami, ipconfig, net user) which are often used by attackers after gaining initial access, as suggested in the report's hunting hints.
references:
  - https://www.devexpress.com/Support/Demos/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-27
tags:
  - attack.t1082
  - attack.t1087
  - attack.t1016
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
    - Image|endswith: '\whoami.exe'
    - Image|endswith: '\ipconfig.exe'
    - Image|endswith: '\net.exe'
    - Image|endswith: '\net1.exe'
  selection_cli:
    Image|endswith: '\net.exe'
    CommandLine|contains: ' user'
  condition: 1 of selection_*
indicators.description: Detects the execution of basic reconnaissance commands (whoami, ipconfig, net user) which are often used by attackers after gaining initial access, as suggested in the report's hunting hints.
